title: SAME DAY CLINIC - 211info
text: DUNES FAMILY HEALTH CARE SAME DAY CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers non-emergency medical appointments for existing patients when their primary care physician (PCP) is unavailable or if they do not have a PCP. Services are provided by physicians and/or nurse practitioners. 620 Ranch Road Reedsport, OR 97467 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm, by appointment only Email (541) 271-6309 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 271-6309 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts Medicare, OHP, (Open Card and Trillium) and private insurance. Payment plans may be available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Coos Bay, Dunes City, Florence, Gardiner, Lakeside, North Bend, Reedsport, Scottsburg, and Winchester Bay SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: General Medical Care Urgent Care Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - DUNES FAMILY HEALTH CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
